architecture: Sequential MLP: Dense(14→128, ReLU) + Dropout(0.2) + Dense(128→64, ReLU) + Dropout(0.2) + Dense(64→2, Softmax)
training_distribution_note: The trained scaler.pkl was fitted on data from a real eye-tracker (mean Z ≈ 510 mm = ~50 cm viewing distance, mean Pupil X ≈ 595 px on a wide-angle sensor). MediaPipe-derived inputs from a webcam will NOT match this distribution — feeding them through scaler.pkl puts them many sigmas out of training. The pipeline therefore defaults to EYE_TRACKING_PREPROC=online_standardize, which standardises per-batch so the MLP receives in-distribution values regardless of camera/screen setup.
